name: HKMA Project Ensemble (EnsembleTX)

issuer.name: Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) + Securities and Futures Commission (SFC)

custodian.name: Participating banks (Standard Chartered, HSBC, Bank of China HK, etc.)

chain_infra.name: Permissioned interbank layer + HKD RTGS for settlement

regulator.name: HKMA + SFC + BIS Innovation Hub HK Centre

entity_map.token_standard: Tokenized deposit standards (per bank); wCBDC standard TBD

summary: HKMA's flagship tokenization initiative and the operational core of Hong Kong's institutional RWA strategy. Project Ensemble Sandbox launched August 2024 with four themes (fixed income/funds, liquidity management, green/sustainable finance, trade/supply chain finance). Pilot phase EnsembleTX commenced November 2025, operating throughout 2026 with real-value transactions in tokenized deposits and tokenized money market funds. Participants include Standard Chartered, HSBC, Bank of China (Hong Kong), BlackRock, Franklin Templeton. Settlement via HKD RTGS initially; will progressively upgrade to 24/7 tokenized central bank money settlement. Currently the most operationally advanced central bank tokenization pilot in Asia.

sources.title: The Block: HK launches tokenized deposit pilot with real-value transactions

underlying_asset: Tokenized HKD bank deposits; tokenized money market fund units; future scope includes tokenized bonds, green finance instruments, trade finance receivables.
reserve_composition: Tokenized deposits 1:1 with issuing bank's deposit liability; MMF units backed per fund prospectus.
secondary_market: Permissioned interbank market initially; potential expansion to professional investor secondary trading per SFC tokenization circular framework.
oracle_provider: Per use case; fixed income use case uses Bloomberg/Refinitiv for pricing.
redemption_mechanism: Tokenized deposit redemption against issuing bank; MMF redemption per fund terms with atomic settlement.
upgrade_authority: HKMA + SFC joint governance; participating institutions implement via their own infrastructure.

timeline.event: HKMA announces Project Ensemble at HK Web3 Festival
Project Ensemble Sandbox launched with 4 themes
2025 Policy Address commits to advancing Ensemble for real-value transactions
EnsembleTX pilot phase launched; commercial bank participation finalized
EnsembleTX operates throughout 2026; CeBM 24/7 settlement upgrade planned
